---
title: "FADN2Footprint"
---

## About the Project

The **FADN2Footprint** project aims to... [add your description here].

### Methodology
We use advanced data processing to map agricultural economic data to environmental impacts.

```python
# You can easily show off python or R code like this!
import pandas as pd
def calculate_footprint(fadn_data):
    # Your brilliant code here
    pass
